title: Integrated Awareness
definition: A state of consciousness that is awake, compassionate, unattached, yet human.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Being mindful and empathetic while maintaining personal freedom and identity in a modern world.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A unique blend of awareness, compassion, detachment, and humanity that allows one to navigate the complexities of modern life.
difficulty_levels.expert: A philosophical concept embodying an individual's ability to remain deeply connected to their own consciousness while still being fully immersed in the world, embodying the essence of a modern-day Buddha.

extra_fields.insight: The ability to maintain a state of enlightenment and compassion within the context of contemporary life.
